text:
NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX line 

VALUES: Valid numeric value, three decimal places. 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: This variable and the NDC Quantity Dispensed variable (NDC_QTY) may, in some cases, represent the 
same thing. 

Refer to the NDC Unit of Measure Code (UOM_CD) for the unit of measurement. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
